summary: Added PostgreSQL-backed runtime wiring, migration execution, and Docker Compose assets so the API can run against Postgres with the documented initial schema.
reason: The user requested Docker and docker-compose support with PostgreSQL, and the database rules were taken from docs/architecture/initial.db and docs/architecture/schema.dbml.
risk: Medium. Startup now depends on PostgreSQL availability and container image pulls; schema initialization is automated from the documented initial SQL.
tests: docker compose -f deployments/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --build (attempted, timed out during postgres image pull)
notes: Application startup now waits for PostgreSQL readiness before serving traffic.
The health endpoint reports database availability and returns 503 when Postgres is down.
The Compose stack uses postgres:17-alpine and seeds the schema from deployments/docker/postgres/init/001_initial.sql.
